Northern Virginia isn't just growing , it's booming. 📊 And federal contracting is leading the charge.

Here's what's fueling the surge:

✅ Billions in new DoD & DHS contracts post-budget approvals
✅ Skyrocketing demand for cleared cybersecurity professionals
✅ AI & cloud modernization across every federal agency
✅ Proximity to decision-makers = faster hiring cycles

For professionals with security clearances or government IT experience, the market has never been more favorable.

NoVA isn't just a place to work ,it's where careers in public service technology are being built.

Role: ML Engineer 
Location: Minneapolis, MN (5 Days Onsite)
 
Need 10+ Years experience 

 Job Description: 
 · Translate data science prototypes into production-grade ML services and pipelines. 
 · Build training and inference code with reproducibility, versioning, and automated testing. 
 · Implement scalable model serving (online/offline), batching, and latency/throughput optimization. 
 · Integrate model lifecycle tooling (tracking, registry, deployment automation, monitoring). 
 · Collaborate with Data Engineering on feature pipelines and data contracts. 
 · Own production health: drift detection, performance regression, rollback strategies, and incident response." 
 · "5+ years software engineering with 2+ years shipping ML models to production. 
 · Strong Python skills and experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow/PyTorch). 
 · Experience with containers and orchestration (Docker/Kubernetes) and API development. 
 · Understanding of ML system design (data leakage, training-serving skew, drift). 
 · CI/CD and DevOps practices applied to ML workloads (MLOps)." 
 · "Experience with feature stores, model registries, and model monitoring stacks. 
 · GPU optimization and distributed training experience. 
 · Experience with responsible AI toolkits and compliance requirements." 
 · Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Docker, REST APIs 
#AI #JobAlerts #C2C #Machinelearning #Python #datascientist #hiring

Thanks & Regards.
Bhuvnesh

Hiring | Enterprise Integration Engineer | Seattle, WA | Contract/ HYBRID
Role: Engineer
Desired Skills: OIC, OCI, O2C, SQL

Must Have Technical/Functional Skills: 
Strong hands-on experience with Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC).
Proven experience designing and architecting enterprise integration solutions.
Experience integrating heterogeneous systems (ERP, legacy applications, third-party systems, cloud, and on-premise platforms) using diverse integration patterns.
Hands-on experience integrating Oracle ERP Cloud, Sales Cloud, CRM/CPQ, Demand Planning Cloud, EDI, and 3PL systems.
 Experience with EDI (X12) integrations.
Exposure to Order-to-Cash (O2C), Procure-to-Pay (P2P), and Manufacturing business processes.
Strong SQL and PL/SQL development expertise.
Experience developing BI Publisher reports, ESS jobs, and BICC extracts.
Working knowledge of Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and Oracle APEX development.
Knowledge of CI/CD and DevOps deployment methodologies.
Exposure to Oracle SOA Suite, WebLogic, OSB, and MFT is a plus.
Exposure to AI-driven automation capabilities such as OIC RPA, Fusion Intelligent Agents, or related automation frameworks is preferred.
OIC Certification preferred.

🚨 Now Hiring eDiscovery Talent in California 🌴 
We are partnering with leading global law firms to bring on top-tier eDiscovery and Litigation Technology professionals across multiple roles. If you thrive at the intersection of law, data, and technology-these opportunities are worth a look 👇
🔹 Senior Litigation & eDiscovery Services Analyst-San Francisco / San Diego
Play a key role across the full lifecycle managing Relativity & CSDisco databases, advising on eDiscovery strategy, and leveraging cutting-edge AI tools. Ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex challenges in high-stakes matters.
🔹 Contract eDiscovery Analyst-California (1-year contract, potential to convert)
Support day-to-day operations with a strong focus on Relativity-workspace setup, processing, QC, and troubleshooting. Perfect for a hands-on professional who can independently manage cases in a fast-paced environment.
🔹 eDiscovery Counsel-SF
Lead sophisticated discovery strategy from preservation through trial. This client-facing role blends legal expertise with advanced analytics, offering the chance to shape litigation strategy and mentor teams.
💡 These roles offer the chance to work with innovative technology, high-profile matters, and collaborative legal teams.
📩 Interested or know someone who might be a fit? Let’s connect. Michelle.Shanik@trulegal.ai TruLegal (formerly TRU Staffing)

 Software Engineer IV (Salesforce Health Cloud + AI/ML + Bedrock)
Overview
We are hiring a Senior Software Engineer (Level IV) with strong Salesforce Health Cloud expertise and experience integrating AI/ML capabilities via AWS Bedrock and SageMaker. This role focuses on configuration-heavy Salesforce solutions with targeted custom development.
Key Responsibilities
•        Design and implement Salesforce Health Cloud solutions (primarily configuration, some Apex/LWC customization)
•        Integrate AWS Bedrock AI capabilities into Salesforce workflows and user experiences
•        Develop and maintain API integrations between Salesforce and AWS services
•        Build AI-driven features such as:
o       Case summarization
o       Intelligent recommendations
o       Automated workflows
•        Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define architecture and requirements
•        Ensure compliance with federal security and data standards
Required Qualifications
•        Bachelor’s degree + relevant certifications
•        8–12 years of experience in software engineering
•        Strong experience with:
o       Salesforce Health Cloud
o       Salesforce configuration (Flows, Objects, Security Model)
o       Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC) (light to moderate coding)
•        Hands-on experience with:
o       AWS Bedrock
o       AWS SageMaker (basic familiarity acceptable)
•        Experience integrating cloud platforms (AWS + Salesforce)
Preferred Qualifications
•        Salesforce certifications (e.g., Administrator, Platform Developer, Health Cloud Consultant)
•        Experience with AI/ML use cases in CRM systems
•        Knowledge of FHIR/health data standards (nice-to-have)
•        DoD or federal experience
•        Ability to obtain Public Trust clearance
Recruiter Keywords
Salesforce Health Cloud, Apex, LWC, AWS Bedrock, SageMaker, CRM AI, API Integration, Federal, AI/ML

We are currently hiring a Senior Software Engineer to support Queensland, Australia-based healthcare technology projects on a 12-month full-time contract, with a remote work setup from the Philippines.

⭐ About the Role
You will design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications for healthcare-related platforms using modern technologies. You will collaborate with global engineering teams to deliver high-quality features and contribute to system design, architecture, and performance optimization.
This role also involves integrating AI-related capabilities into web applications to enhance user experience and system efficiency.

⭐ Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain web applications using ReactJS, NodeJS, and TypeScript
Build and support RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL services
Design and implement responsive, user-friendly interfaces
Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
Support and improve CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps
Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve production issues
Collaborate with cross-functional and global teams
Contribute to agile development processes

⭐ Required Skills & Experience
5–10+ years experience in Software Engineering
Strong experience with ReactJS, NodeJS, and TypeScript
Experience with JavaScript (ES6+)
Experience with REST APIs and/or GraphQL
Experience with Azure DevOps / CI-CD pipelines
Strong understanding of web application development
Experience working in Agile environments
Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
Experience working in healthcare organizations or healthcare-related systems is required or a strong advantage

⭐ Contract Details
12-month full-time contract
Remote setup (Philippines)

If you're interested in this opportunity, please send us a DM or submit your updated CV for review.

I’m hashtag #hiring. Know anyone who might be interested?
Share me with your resume at anu@convextech.com                                      
Title: AI Engineer Only Genuine Visa 
Location:. Birmingham, AL (Hybrid)
Duration: Long Term Contract
Visa Restrictions: No H1b/CPT.
Experience Level: Mid-Senior (Minimum 3+ Years)

Job Description:
We are seeking a high-velocity Software Engineer who views AI as a force multiplier rather than just a tool. This role is designed for a self-starter who excels at bridging the gap between core backend engineering (Java or .NET) and modern data intelligence.
You won't just be writing code; you will be leveraging advanced AI assistants—specifically Claude and Tabnine—to ingest, process, and interpret large datasets to generate actionable business reports. The ideal candidate is a "technical fixer" who thrives on solving complex issues quickly and enjoys the challenge of optimizing workflows through AI automation.
 
Key Responsibilities
·   Backend Development: Design, develop, and maintain robust services using Java or the .NET framework.
·   AI-Driven Data Synthesis: Use LLMs (Claude) and AI coding assistants (Tabnine) to accelerate the consumption of large-scale data and automate the generation of technical documentation and business reports.
·   Rapid Problem Solving: Act as a first responder for technical bottlenecks, utilizing AI tools to debug, refactor, and deploy fixes with high efficiency.
·   Reporting & Analytics: Transform raw data into structured business reports that provide clear insights to stakeholders.
·   Hybrid Collaboration: Work from our Birmingham, AL office on a flexible hybrid schedule, maintaining strong communication with both technical teams and business leadership.
 
Required Qualifications
·   Experience: Minimum of 3 years of professional software development experience in either Java or .NET.
·   AI Proficiency: Demonstrated experience using AI tools (e.g., Claude, Tabnine, GitHub Copilot) to enhance coding speed and data processing capabilities.
·   Data Literacy: Strong ability to handle large datasets and translate technical findings into structured business formats.
·   Soft Skills: A self-starter mentality with a "bias for action." You should be someone who enjoys autonomy and takes pride in rapid delivery.
 
Technical Stack & Tools
·   Languages: Java (Spring Boot) or .NET (C#, .NET Core).
·   AI Tools: Claude (Anthropic), Tabnine, and related LLM interfaces.
·   Reporting: SQL, PowerBI, Tableau, or custom-built automated reporting scripts.
·   Environment: Git, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure.

Thanks and Regards
 
Anubhav Pharasi
Technical Recruiter
Convex Tech Inc.
Email: anu@convextech.com
LinkedIn: https://lnkd.in/gRTcGHcV

• Architect scalable backend systems using Python (Django/Flask)

• Design and implement RAG pipelines (chunking, embeddings, retrieval)
